example: We need to negotiate the terms of the contract before signing.
exampleTrans: 簽約前我們需要協商合約條款。

example: Please send the invoice to the accounting department.
exampleTrans: 請將請款單寄給會計部門。

example: The quarterly report shows a steady increase in sales.
exampleTrans: 季報顯示銷售額穩定成長。

example: The deadline for submitting the proposal is Friday.
exampleTrans: 提案的截止期限是星期五。

example: Your travel itinerary has been attached to this email.
exampleTrans: 您的差旅行程表已附在這封郵件中。

example: The company will reimburse you for all travel expenses.
exampleTrans: 公司會核銷你所有的差旅費用。

example: The merger between the two firms was announced yesterday.
exampleTrans: 兩家公司的合併案於昨日宣布。

example: She works in the procurement department.
exampleTrans: 她在採購部門工作。

example: This appliance comes with a two-year warranty.
exampleTrans: 這台家電附有兩年保固。

example: The shipment will arrive at the warehouse on Monday.
exampleTrans: 這批貨將於週一抵達倉庫。

example: All applicants must submit a resume and cover letter.
exampleTrans: 所有應徵者都必須繳交履歷與求職信。

example: We plan to recruit five engineers this quarter.
exampleTrans: 我們計劃本季招募五名工程師。

example: She received a promotion to regional manager.
exampleTrans: 她升任區域經理。

example: Annual revenue grew by 15 percent last year.
exampleTrans: 去年年營收成長了 15%。

example: The finance team is reviewing marketing expenditures.
exampleTrans: 財務團隊正在檢視行銷支出。

example: The corporation has subsidiaries in twelve countries.
exampleTrans: 該企業在十二個國家設有子公司。

example: All procedures must be in compliance with safety regulations.
exampleTrans: 所有流程都必須符合安全法規。

example: The first item on the agenda is the budget review.
exampleTrans: 議程的第一項是預算審查。

example: Could you take the minutes for today's meeting?
exampleTrans: 你可以負責今天會議的紀錄嗎？

example: The conference venue can accommodate 500 people.
exampleTrans: 這個會議場地可容納五百人。

example: Customers may request a full refund within 30 days.
exampleTrans: 顧客可在三十天內要求全額退款。

example: The defective items were returned to the manufacturer.
exampleTrans: 瑕疵品已退回製造商。

example: The store conducts an inventory check every month.
exampleTrans: 這家店每個月進行一次庫存盤點。

example: Please ask your supervisor to approve the request.
exampleTrans: 請你的主管核准這項申請。

example: My colleagues and I are working on the new campaign.
exampleTrans: 我和同事們正在進行新的行銷活動。

example: The office lease expires at the end of the year.
exampleTrans: 辦公室租約在年底到期。

example: An amendment to the contract was proposed by the client.
exampleTrans: 客戶提出了一項合約修訂。

example: The sales forecast for next quarter looks promising.
exampleTrans: 下一季的銷售預測看起來很樂觀。

example: The documents were sent by courier this morning.
exampleTrans: 文件今天早上已由快遞寄出。

example: We will do our best to accommodate your schedule.
exampleTrans: 我們會盡力配合您的時間安排。
